channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Majembe Considers Selling His New Car Due to High Costs After Boxing Victory
item.description: Budding Kenyan boxer Portifas Odipo, popularly known as Majembe, has revealed that he plans to sell his new Toyota Noah, just weeks after winning the highly publicised match against Mbavu Destroyer du...

item.title: Pakistan’s Evolving Security Situation Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: While Pakistan was focused on facilitating dialogue between the US and Iran, domestic security concerns have been rising sharply. The country has witnessed an increase in terrorist attacks, with fatal...

item.title: Nepean by-election won by Liberals as US approves emergency arms sales to Middle East allies
item.description: In the Victorian state seat of Nepean, the Liberal Party secured a victory in Saturday’s by-election, despite a reduced primary vote and strong competition from One Nation and a popular local independ...

item.title: Ferrari Purosangue receives Handling Speciale package with performance and visual upgrades
item.description: Ferrari has introduced the Handling Speciale package for its Purosangue SUV, focusing on enhanced driving dynamics and sharper handling. The package includes a recalibrated active suspension system, w...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly Elections: Mamata Banerjee Confident of TMC Winning Over 200 Seats
item.description: Ahead of the assembly election results counting on May 4, West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee strongly dismissed exit polls, claiming they were conducted to manipulate the stock market. Speakin...

item.title: The Influence of Anna Wintour in the Fashion Industry
item.description: Anna Wintour has been one of the most influential figures in the fashion world for decades. As the editor-in-chief of Vogue magazine, Wintour holds tremendous power, shaping trends, setting industry s...

item.title: Challenges to Press Freedom and Free Speech in Pakistan
item.description: In Pakistan, press freedom is facing severe challenges as journalists, media workers, and ordinary citizens encounter arrests, financial pressure, and online harassment for expressing views critical o...

item.title: Impact of U.S. and Israeli Airstrikes on Iran's Religious and Ethnic Minorities
item.description: The U.S.-Israeli military campaign in Iran has had severe consequences for the country’s religious and ethnic minorities. Just before a ceasefire on April 8, airstrikes targeted a 68-year-old synagogu...

item.title: Philippine Civilians Raise Flag on Pagasa Cay 2 During Ongoing Chinese Presence
item.description: On Sunday, May 3, 2026, a Philippine civilian mission successfully raised the national flag on Pagasa Cay 2, also known as Sandy Cay, despite the heavy presence of Chinese vessels in the area. The ope...

item.title: 22-year-old migrant charged with two murders in New York within hours
item.description: Authorities in Nassau County, New York, have charged Rony Yahir Alvarenga Rivera, a 22-year-old migrant from El Salvador, with one count of first-degree murder and two counts of second-degree murder f...

item.title: Iran proposes Strait of Hormuz deal while delaying nuclear talks, but US remains unconvinced
item.description: Iran has proposed a diplomatic framework aimed at easing tensions in the ongoing conflict with the United States and Israel, focusing first on reopening the Strait of Hormuz while postponing negotiati...

item.title: Dwayne Johnson briefly stopped by police after attending co-star’s Hollywood Walk of Fame celebration
item.description: Dwayne Johnson, famously known as The Rock, had a brief encounter with police in Hollywood right after attending a joint Walk of Fame ceremony for his co-stars Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci. Reports s...

item.title: Repairs Initiated to Improve Safety of Beata Bridge
item.description: Repairs have officially started on Beata Bridge, a major thoroughfare known for its high accident rate. The Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) is addressing the concerns that have made the...

item.title: Kenyan Teacher Shares Clear Accounting Notes, Impresses with Handwriting
item.description: Jared Ngere, a Kenyan teacher of History and Business Studies, has gone viral on social media because of his incredibly neat handwriting. He recently posted accounting notes on Facebook aimed at educa...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi criticises BJP over alleged indecent remarks against Congress MP Geniben Thakor
item.description: Leader of the Opposition in the Lok Sabha, Rahul Gandhi, has strongly criticised the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) following a controversy involving alleged indecent remarks made by the party’s Gujarat...

item.title: NLEX routs Converge to secure twice-to-beat advantage
item.description: NLEX strengthened its position in the PBA Season 50 Commissioner’s Cup by overpowering Converge, 100-81, at the Ninoy Aquino Stadium on May 2, 2026. The Road Warriors were tied in a tight contest earl...

item.title: Coalition preferencing One Nation risks its position in Farrer
item.description: In the Farrer electorate, the Coalition has opted to direct preferences to One Nation, a move criticised for potentially delivering the party its first lower house seat win. Zoe Daniel argues that thi...

item.title: The Kentucky Derby: a blend of sporting tradition, fashion and spectacle
item.description: The Kentucky Derby, held annually at Churchill Downs in Louisville, continues to stand as one of the most enduring and recognisable sporting events in the United States. Marking its 152nd running, the...

item.title: 19-year-old charged following bomb hoax at Peter Kay performance in Birmingham
item.description: A 19-year-old man from Birmingham has been charged in relation to a bomb hoax that led to the evacuation of a Peter Kay comedy show on Friday night. Omar Majed, from Washwood Heath, has been charged w...

item.title: Mumbai Woman Details Her Struggle During Traffic Jam Caused by BJP Rally
item.description: Last week, videos went viral showing a Mumbai woman confronting BJP MLA Girish Mahajan over a traffic jam caused by a protest rally in Worli. In her recent video statement, Teena Chaudhry shared her e...
